cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees frequently cite the value of the employee discount, wellness stipends, and competitive hourly wages as key benefits.

cluster_summaries.label: Culture & Belonging
cluster_summaries.summary: Many staff members report a positive, collaborative team atmosphere that encourages personal growth and social connection.

cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: While some appreciate the flexibility of part-time roles, others report that scheduling demands can interfere with personal life balance.

cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees value mentorship and the chance to develop leadership skills, though some feel these opportunities are limited.

cluster_summaries.label: Safety & Fairness
cluster_summaries.summary: While some employees highlight supportive coworkers, others express concerns regarding toxic environments and a lack of inclusivity.

cluster_summaries.label: Burnout & Workload
cluster_summaries.summary: High-pressure periods and demanding customer interactions contribute to feelings of exhaustion for some staff.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees report feeling overlooked for promotions or frustrated by a perceived lack of clear career progression.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Reports of bullying management styles and manipulative dynamics suggest a need for improved psychological safety.

cluster_summaries.label: Work-Life Pressure
cluster_summaries.summary: Inflexible scheduling and concerns over livable wages are frequently mentioned as barriers to a healthy work-life balance.

cluster_summaries.label: Disconnected Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees feel isolated due to workplace gossip or cliques, which can detract from the overall team experience.
